---
title: "Match Run Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)


library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(survival)
library(coxme)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(cmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(patchwork)
library(broom)
library(data.table)
library(purrr)

```


``` {r load datasets}

thoracic_wlhistory_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_wlhistory_data", NULL)

thoracic_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_data", NULL)

thoracic_stat1a = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_stat1a", NULL)

thoracic_stat1b = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_stat1b", NULL)

thoracic_mcs_device = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_mcs_device", NULL)

ptr_hrhl = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/HRStatJust2509DanielAhn/thoracic_stat1b", NULL)


```

``` {r time-dependent auc analysis}

# ── Step 1: Snapshot dates ────────────────────────────────────────
snap_dates_auc <- seq.Date(
  as.Date("2016-04-01"),
  as.Date("2024-10-01"),
  by = "3 months"
)

cat("Number of snapshots:", length(snap_dates_auc), "\n")

# ── Step 2: Status history — Status 1A only ───────────────────────
status_hx_auc <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE,
         UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010) %>%
  mutate(
    CHG_DATE     = as.Date(CHG_DATE),
    CHG_END_DATE = as.Date(CHG_END_DATE)
  ) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, CHG_DATE, CHG_END_DATE)

# ── Step 3: ECMO flag data ────────────────────────────────────────
ecmo_snap <- thoracic_mcs_device %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  filter(DEVICE_TYPE %in% c("ECMO", "VA ECMO", "VV ECMO")) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE),
    EXPLANT_DATE = as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, IMPLANT_DATE, EXPLANT_DATE)

# ── Step 4: Vent flag data ────────────────────────────────────────
vent_snap <- thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION)) %>%
  mutate(UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE)) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
         REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION) %>%
  arrange(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE)

# ── Step 5: Outcomes ──────────────────────────────────────────────
outcomes_auc <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, END_DATE, death) %>%
  mutate(END_DATE = as.Date(END_DATE))

# ── Step 6: Build snapshot dataset ───────────────────────────────
cat("Building AUC snapshot dataset (Status 1A only)...\n")

auc_snap_data <- map_dfr(snap_dates_auc, function(dt) {
  
  # ── Active Status 1A candidates at this snapshot ──────────────
  active_1a <- status_hx_auc %>%
    filter(CHG_DATE <= dt,
           is.na(CHG_END_DATE) | CHG_END_DATE > dt) %>%
    distinct(WL_ID_CODE)
  
  if (nrow(active_1a) < 10) return(NULL)
  
  # ── Waiting time at snapshot ──────────────────────────────────
  wt_at_snap <- status_hx_auc %>%
    filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
           CHG_DATE <= dt) %>%
    mutate(
      period_end   = pmin(CHG_END_DATE, dt,
                          na.rm = TRUE),
      days_counted = as.numeric(period_end - CHG_DATE)
    ) %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    summarise(
      wait_days = sum(days_counted, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups   = "drop"
    )
  
  # ── ECMO flag at snapshot ─────────────────────────────────────
  ecmo_at_snap <- ecmo_snap %>%
    filter(
      WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
      IMPLANT_DATE <= dt,
      is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) | EXPLANT_DATE > dt
    ) %>%
    distinct(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    mutate(on_ecmo = 1L)
  
  # ── Vent flag at snapshot ─────────────────────────────────────
  vent_at_snap <- vent_snap %>%
    filter(
      WL_ID_CODE %in% active_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
      UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= dt
    ) %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    slice_max(UPGRADE_EXTDATE, n = 1,
              with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      on_vent = as.integer(
        REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1)
    ) %>%
    select(WL_ID_CODE, on_vent)
  
  # ── Combine ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  snap_df <- active_1a %>%
    left_join(wt_at_snap,   by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    left_join(ecmo_at_snap, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    left_join(vent_at_snap, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    mutate(
      on_ecmo     = replace_na(on_ecmo, 0L),
      on_vent     = replace_na(on_vent, 0L),
      wait_days   = replace_na(wait_days, 0),
      new_status1 = as.integer(on_ecmo == 1 | on_vent == 1)
    )
  
  # ── Current system rank: waiting time only ────────────────────
  snap_df <- snap_df %>%
    arrange(desc(wait_days)) %>%
    mutate(rank_current = row_number())
  
  # ── Counterfactual rank: ECMO/MV first, then waiting time ─────
  snap_df <- snap_df %>%
    arrange(desc(new_status1), desc(wait_days)) %>%
    mutate(rank_cf = row_number())
  
  # ── Outcomes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  snap_df <- snap_df %>%
    left_join(outcomes_auc, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    mutate(
      time_to_event = as.numeric(END_DATE - dt),
      event_90      = as.integer(
        death == 1 &
          !is.na(time_to_event) &
          time_to_event > 0 &
          time_to_event <= 90
      ),
      time_days_90  = case_when(
        event_90 == 1                                  ~ time_to_event,
        !is.na(time_to_event) & time_to_event > 0 &
          time_to_event < 90                           ~ time_to_event,
        TRUE                                           ~ 90
      ),
      time_days_90  = pmax(time_days_90, 1),
      snapshot_date = dt
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(time_days_90))
  
  snap_df
})

# ── Step 7: Summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nSnapshot dataset summary:\n")
cat("Total rows:", nrow(auc_snap_data), "\n")
cat("Total events:", sum(auc_snap_data$event_90), "\n")
cat("Unique candidates:",
    n_distinct(auc_snap_data$WL_ID_CODE), "\n")
cat("Snapshots with data:",
    n_distinct(auc_snap_data$snapshot_date), "\n")
cat("Event rate:",
    round(mean(auc_snap_data$event_90) * 100, 1), "%\n")

cat("\nNew Status 1 (ECMO/MV) rows:",
    sum(auc_snap_data$new_status1),
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)\n",
            mean(auc_snap_data$new_status1) * 100))

# ── Step 8: Time-dependent AUC ────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nComputing time-dependent AUC...\n")

auc_current <- timeROC(
  T         = auc_snap_data$time_days_90,
  delta     = auc_snap_data$event_90,
  marker    = -auc_snap_data$rank_current,
  cause     = 1,
  weighting = "marginal",
  times     = 89,
  iid       = TRUE
)

auc_cf <- timeROC(
  T         = auc_snap_data$time_days_90,
  delta     = auc_snap_data$event_90,
  marker    = -auc_snap_data$rank_cf,
  cause     = 1,
  weighting = "marginal",
  times     = 89,
  iid       = TRUE
)

cat("\n=== TIME-DEPENDENT AUC AT 90 DAYS ===\n")
cat("Current System AUC:         ",
    round(auc_current$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("4-Status Counterfactual AUC:",
    round(auc_cf$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("AUC difference (CF - Current):",
    round(auc_cf$AUC[2] - auc_current$AUC[2], 3), "\n")




# ── Clustered bootstrap ───────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(42)
n_boot     <- 1000
unique_ids <- unique(auc_snap_data$WL_ID_CODE)

cat("Unique candidates to resample:", length(unique_ids), "\n")
cat("Running clustered bootstrap (n =", n_boot, ")...\n")

# Convert to data.table for faster subsetting
auc_dt <- as.data.table(auc_snap_data)
setkey(auc_dt, WL_ID_CODE)

boot_results <- vector("list", n_boot)
pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = n_boot, style = 3)

for (i in seq_len(n_boot)) {
  tryCatch({
    # Resample candidates with replacement
    boot_ids <- sample(unique_ids,
                       length(unique_ids),
                       replace = TRUE)
    
    # Build bootstrap dataset using data.table join
    # (allows duplicate IDs from resampling)
    id_dt    <- data.table(WL_ID_CODE = boot_ids,
                           boot_row   = seq_along(boot_ids))
    boot_dat <- auc_dt[id_dt, on = "WL_ID_CODE",
                       allow.cartesian = TRUE]
    
    if (sum(boot_dat$event_90) < 5) next
    
    roc_curr <- timeROC(
      T         = boot_dat$time_days_90,
      delta     = boot_dat$event_90,
      marker    = -boot_dat$rank_current,
      cause     = 1,
      weighting = "marginal",
      times     = 89,
      iid       = FALSE
    )
    
    roc_cf <- timeROC(
      T         = boot_dat$time_days_90,
      delta     = boot_dat$event_90,
      marker    = -boot_dat$rank_cf,
      cause     = 1,
      weighting = "marginal",
      times     = 89,
      iid       = FALSE
    )
    
    boot_results[[i]] <- tibble(
      auc_current = roc_curr$AUC[2],
      auc_cf      = roc_cf$AUC[2],
      auc_diff    = roc_cf$AUC[2] - roc_curr$AUC[2]
    )
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
  
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)
}
close(pb)

boot_clean <- bind_rows(boot_results)
cat("\nSuccessful iterations:", nrow(boot_clean), "/",
    n_boot, "\n")

# ── Results ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n=== BOOTSTRAP RESULTS ===\n")

cat("\nCurrent System AUC:\n")
cat("  Point estimate:",
    round(auc_current$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("  Bootstrap mean:",
    round(mean(boot_clean$auc_current, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("  95% CI:        ",
    round(quantile(boot_clean$auc_current,
                   0.025, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "-",
    round(quantile(boot_clean$auc_current,
                   0.975, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")

cat("\n4-Status Counterfactual AUC:\n")
cat("  Point estimate:",
    round(auc_cf$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("  Bootstrap mean:",
    round(mean(boot_clean$auc_cf, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("  95% CI:        ",
    round(quantile(boot_clean$auc_cf,
                   0.025, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "-",
    round(quantile(boot_clean$auc_cf,
                   0.975, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")

cat("\nAUC difference (CF - Current):\n")
cat("  Point estimate:",
    round(auc_cf$AUC[2] - auc_current$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("  Bootstrap mean:",
    round(mean(boot_clean$auc_diff, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("  95% CI:        ",
    round(quantile(boot_clean$auc_diff,
                   0.025, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "-",
    round(quantile(boot_clean$auc_diff,
                   0.975, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("  p-value (H0: diff=0):",
    round(mean(boot_clean$auc_diff <= 0,
               na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")



```


``` {r match run analysis}

# ── Check thoracic_stat1a structure ───────────────────────────────
cat("Columns in thoracic_stat1a:\n")
colnames(thoracic_stat1a) %>% print()

cat("\nREQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION distribution:\n")
thoracic_stat1a %>%
  count(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION) %>%
  print()

cat("\nDate field:\n")
thoracic_stat1a %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
         REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION) %>%
  head(5) %>%
  print()

# ── Overlap with ptr_hrhl pediatric candidates ────────────────────
ptr_ped_ids <- ptr_hrhl %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  distinct(WL_ID_CODE)

cat("\nPediatric candidates in ptr_hrhl:",
    nrow(ptr_ped_ids), "\n")

cat("With ventilation forms in thoracic_stat1a:\n")
thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ptr_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows       = n(),
    n_candidates = n_distinct(WL_ID_CODE),
    n_ever_vent  = n_distinct(
      WL_ID_CODE[REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1]
    )
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\nREQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE (MCS flag):\n")
thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ptr_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  count(REQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE) %>%
  print()

# ── Step 1: Add donor age to ptr_study ───────────────────────────
ptr_study <- ptr_hrhl %>%
  filter(
    WL_ORG %in% c("HR", "HL"),
    as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) >= as.Date("2019-01-01"),
    as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) <= as.Date("2024-12-31")
  ) %>%
  mutate(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT = as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT)) %>%
  left_join(
    deceased_donor_data %>%
      select(DONOR_ID, AGE_DON, ABO_DON),
    by = "DONOR_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    is_adult_donor = !is.na(AGE_DON) & AGE_DON >= 18,
    is_ped_donor   = !is.na(AGE_DON) & AGE_DON < 18,
    class_prefix   = as.numeric(
      gsub("-.*", "", trimws(CLASS_ID))
    )
  )

# ── Step 2: Keep match runs with any pediatric candidate ──────────
all_ped_ids <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(
    WL_ORG   == "HR",
    INIT_AGE < 18,
    as.Date(INIT_DATE) <= as.Date("2024-12-31")
  ) %>%
  distinct(WL_ID_CODE)

cat("Total pediatric HR candidates (all years):",
    nrow(all_ped_ids), "\n")

ptr_ped_runs <- ptr_study %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  filter(any(WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    is_ped_1a = WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE
  )

cat("Match runs with any ped candidate:",
    n_distinct(ptr_ped_runs$MATCH_ID_CODE), "\n")
cat("Pediatric 1A rows (analytic cohort):",
    sum(ptr_ped_runs$is_ped_1a), "\n")
cat("Total rows on these match runs:",
    nrow(ptr_ped_runs), "\n")

# ── Step 3: Flag Ped 1A classifications ──────────────────────────
ped_1a_adult_donor_prefixes <- c(
  100, 200, 700, 800, 2100, 2200,
  3300, 3400, 4500, 4600
)
ped_1a_ped_donor_prefixes <- c(
  100, 200, 2900, 3000, 5100, 5200,
  6900, 7000, 8700, 8800
)

ptr_ped_runs <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  mutate(
    is_ped_1a_class = case_when(
      is_adult_donor &
        class_prefix %in% ped_1a_adult_donor_prefixes ~ TRUE,
      is_ped_donor &
        class_prefix %in% ped_1a_ped_donor_prefixes   ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ FALSE
    )
  )

cat("\nPed 1A classification check:\n")
ptr_ped_runs %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a) %>%
  count(is_ped_1a_class) %>%
  print()

# ── Step 4: Build ventilation flag ────────────────────────────────
ped_on_runs <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a) %>%
  select(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
         MATCH_SUBMIT_DT, PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
         class_prefix, is_ped_1a_class,
         is_adult_donor, is_ped_donor) %>%
  as_tibble()

vent_tv <- thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION)) %>%
  mutate(UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE)) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE,
         REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION) %>%
  arrange(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE)

cat("Adding ventilation flags...\n")

vent_at_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(vent_tv, by = "WL_ID_CODE",
            relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  filter(is.na(UPGRADE_EXTDATE) |
           UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
           MATCH_SUBMIT_DT, PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM) %>%
  slice_max(UPGRADE_EXTDATE, n = 1,
            with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    on_vent = case_when(
      is.na(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION) ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ as.integer(REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
         MATCH_SUBMIT_DT, PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
         class_prefix, is_ped_1a_class,
         is_adult_donor, is_ped_donor, on_vent)

cat("Ventilated ped 1A rows:",
    sum(vent_at_match$on_vent == 1), "\n")
cat("Non-vent ped 1A rows:",
    sum(vent_at_match$on_vent == 0), "\n")

# ── Step 5: Add ECMO flag ─────────────────────────────────────────
ecmo_tv <- thoracic_mcs_device %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  filter(DEVICE_TYPE %in% c("ECMO", "VA ECMO", "VV ECMO")) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE),
    EXPLANT_DATE = as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, IMPLANT_DATE, EXPLANT_DATE)

ecmo_at_match <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(ecmo_tv, by = "WL_ID_CODE",
            relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(IMPLANT_DATE),
    IMPLANT_DATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
    is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) | EXPLANT_DATE > MATCH_SUBMIT_DT
  ) %>%
  distinct(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
           MATCH_SUBMIT_DT, PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM) %>%
  mutate(on_ecmo = 1L)

cat("ECMO ped 1A rows:", nrow(ecmo_at_match), "\n")

# ── Step 6: Combine vent + ECMO → New Status 1 ───────────────────
primary_prefixes <- c(
  100, 700, 2100, 3300, 4500,
  100, 2900, 5100, 6900, 8700
)

ped_flags <- vent_at_match %>%
  left_join(
    ecmo_at_match,
    by = c("MATCH_ID_CODE", "WL_ID_CODE",
           "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT", "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    on_ecmo     = replace_na(on_ecmo, 0L),
    new_status1 = as.integer(on_vent == 1 | on_ecmo == 1),
    is_primary  = class_prefix %in% primary_prefixes
  )

cat("\nNew Status 1 distribution:\n")
ped_flags %>%
  count(on_vent, on_ecmo, new_status1) %>%
  print()

# ── Step 7: Active waiting time ───────────────────────────────────
cat("Calculating waiting times...\n")

status_hx_ped <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    CHG_DATE     = as.Date(CHG_DATE),
    CHG_END_DATE = as.Date(CHG_END_DATE)
  ) %>%
  filter(!UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD %in% c(1999, 2999)) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, CHG_DATE, CHG_END_DATE)

waiting_time <- ped_on_runs %>%
  left_join(status_hx_ped, by = "WL_ID_CODE",
            relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  filter(CHG_DATE <= MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) %>%
  mutate(
    period_end   = pmin(CHG_END_DATE, MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
                        na.rm = TRUE),
    days_counted = as.numeric(period_end - CHG_DATE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
           MATCH_SUBMIT_DT, PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM) %>%
  summarise(
    total_active_days = sum(days_counted, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Step 8: Build counterfactual classification ───────────────────
ptr_cf <- ped_flags %>%
  left_join(waiting_time,
            by = c("MATCH_ID_CODE", "WL_ID_CODE",
                   "MATCH_SUBMIT_DT", "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM")) %>%
  mutate(
    total_active_days = replace_na(total_active_days, 0),
    classification_cf = case_when(
      is_ped_1a_class & new_status1 == 1              ~ class_prefix,
      is_ped_1a_class & new_status1 == 0 & is_primary  ~ class_prefix + 120,
      is_ped_1a_class & new_status1 == 0 & !is_primary ~ class_prefix + 40,
      TRUE                                              ~ class_prefix
    )
  )

cat("\nClassification offset verification:\n")
ptr_cf %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a_class) %>%
  group_by(new_status1, class_prefix, is_primary) %>%
  summarise(
    n  = n(),
    cf = first(classification_cf),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(class_prefix, new_status1) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

# ── Step 9: Resequence within each match run ──────────────────────
all_on_runs <- ptr_ped_runs %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  select(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE, PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
         class_prefix, is_ped_1a, MATCH_SUBMIT_DT,
         OFFER_ACCEPT, PTR_CLOSE_NUM) %>%
  left_join(
    ptr_cf %>%
      select(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
             PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM, classification_cf,
             total_active_days, new_status1,
             on_vent, on_ecmo),
    by = c("MATCH_ID_CODE", "WL_ID_CODE",
           "PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    classification_cf = case_when(
      !is.na(classification_cf) ~ classification_cf,
      TRUE                      ~ class_prefix
    ),
    total_active_days = replace_na(total_active_days, 0),
    new_status1       = replace_na(new_status1, NA_integer_)
  )

ptr_resequenced <- all_on_runs %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  arrange(classification_cf, -total_active_days,
          .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    new_sequence_cf    = row_number(),
    sequence_change_cf = new_sequence_cf - PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
    positions_moved_cf = abs(sequence_change_cf),
    moved_up_cf        = sequence_change_cf < 0,
    moved_down_cf      = sequence_change_cf > 0
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n=== 4-STATUS COUNTERFACTUAL COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Total rows:", nrow(ptr_resequenced), "\n")
cat("Match runs:", n_distinct(ptr_resequenced$MATCH_ID_CODE), "\n")

# ── Step 10: Key results ──────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nRank change for ped 1A candidates by new status:\n")
ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a, !is.na(new_status1)) %>%
  group_by(new_status1) %>%
  summarise(
    n                   = n(),
    median_current_rank = median(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM),
    median_new_rank     = median(new_sequence_cf),
    median_change       = median(sequence_change_cf),
    pct_moved_up        = round(mean(moved_up_cf) * 100, 1),
    pct_stayed_same     = round(mean(
      sequence_change_cf == 0) * 100, 1),
    pct_moved_down      = round(mean(moved_down_cf) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  print()

# ── Step 11: Displacement analysis ───────────────────────────────
cat("\nDisplacement analysis:\n")

displacement <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a, !is.na(new_status1)) %>%
  group_by(MATCH_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    has_status1      = any(new_status1 == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    has_status2      = any(new_status1 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_rank_status1 = min(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[new_status1 == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
    min_rank_status2 = min(
      PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM[new_status1 == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(has_status1 & has_status2) %>%
  mutate(
    status2_ranked_above = min_rank_status2 < min_rank_status1
  )

cat("Match runs with both Status 1 and Status 2 candidates:",
    nrow(displacement), "\n")
cat("Match runs where Status 2 ranked above Status 1:",
    sum(displacement$status2_ranked_above),
    sprintf("(%.1f%%)\n",
            mean(displacement$status2_ranked_above) * 100))

cat("\nRank change — New Status 1 candidates:\n")
ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a, new_status1 == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    n              = n(),
    median_current = median(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM),
    median_new     = median(new_sequence_cf),
    median_change  = median(sequence_change_cf),
    pct_up         = round(mean(moved_up_cf) * 100, 1),
    pct_same       = round(mean(
      sequence_change_cf == 0) * 100, 1),
    pct_down       = round(mean(moved_down_cf) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\nRank change — New Status 2 candidates:\n")
ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(is_ped_1a, new_status1 == 0) %>%
  summarise(
    n              = n(),
    median_current = median(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM),
    median_new     = median(new_sequence_cf),
    median_change  = median(sequence_change_cf),
    pct_up         = round(mean(moved_up_cf) * 100, 1),
    pct_same       = round(mean(
      sequence_change_cf == 0) * 100, 1),
    pct_down       = round(mean(moved_down_cf) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  print()

# ── Step 12: Build outcome datasets — ALL pediatric candidates ────
outcomes_all_ped <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(
    WL_ORG   == "HR",
    INIT_AGE < 18,
    as.Date(INIT_DATE) <= as.Date("2024-12-31")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    END_DATE = as.Date(END_DATE),
    death    = as.integer(REM_CD %in% c(8, 13))
  ) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, END_DATE, death)

all_ped_on_runs <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE)

sys_current <- all_ped_on_runs %>%
  select(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
         sequence = PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
         MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) %>%
  mutate(System = "Current System")

sys_cf <- all_ped_on_runs %>%
  select(MATCH_ID_CODE, WL_ID_CODE,
         sequence = new_sequence_cf,
         MATCH_SUBMIT_DT) %>%
  mutate(System = "4-Status Counterfactual")

outcome_long <- bind_rows(sys_current, sys_cf) %>%
  left_join(outcomes_all_ped, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  mutate(
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT = as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT),
    END_DATE        = as.Date(END_DATE),
    time_to_event   = as.numeric(END_DATE - MATCH_SUBMIT_DT),
    event           = as.integer(
      death == 1 &
        !is.na(time_to_event) &
        time_to_event > 0 &
        time_to_event <= 90
    ),
    time_days = case_when(
      event == 1                                   ~ time_to_event,
      !is.na(time_to_event) & time_to_event > 0 &
        time_to_event < 90                         ~ time_to_event,
      TRUE                                         ~ 90
    ),
    time_days = pmax(time_days, 1)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_days), sequence <= 50)

outcome_long_all <- bind_rows(sys_current, sys_cf) %>%
  left_join(outcomes_all_ped, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  mutate(
    MATCH_SUBMIT_DT = as.Date(MATCH_SUBMIT_DT),
    END_DATE        = as.Date(END_DATE),
    time_to_event   = as.numeric(END_DATE - MATCH_SUBMIT_DT),
    event           = as.integer(
      death == 1 &
        !is.na(time_to_event) &
        time_to_event > 0 &
        time_to_event <= 90
    ),
    time_days = case_when(
      event == 1                                   ~ time_to_event,
      !is.na(time_to_event) & time_to_event > 0 &
        time_to_event < 90                         ~ time_to_event,
      TRUE                                         ~ 90
    ),
    time_days = pmax(time_days, 1)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_days))

ptr_all_ped <- ptr_resequenced %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids$WL_ID_CODE)

cat("All ped candidates in outcome dataset:",
    n_distinct(outcome_long_all$WL_ID_CODE), "\n")
cat("outcome_long rows:", nrow(outcome_long), "\n")
cat("outcome_long_all rows:", nrow(outcome_long_all), "\n")
cat("Systems:", unique(outcome_long$System), "\n")

# ── Step 13: Config ───────────────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG_PED <- list(
  L          = 1L,
  P_MAX      = 50L,
  N_MIN      = 10L,
  T_HORIZON  = 90L,
  SEED       = 20240414L,
  CONF_LEVEL = 0.95
)

# ── Step 14: KM and dedup functions ──────────────────────────────
km_at_horizon <- function(dt_pos, t_horizon) {
  fit <- tryCatch(
    survfit(Surv(time_days, event) ~ 1,
            data = dt_pos, conf.type = "log-log"),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
  times <- fit$time
  if (t_horizon <= min(times)) {
    return(list(mortality = 0, se_greenwood = 0,
                n_candidates = nrow(dt_pos),
                surv_lower = 1, surv_upper = 1))
  }
  valid <- which(times <= t_horizon)
  if (length(valid) == 0) return(NULL)
  idx <- max(valid)
  list(
    mortality     = 1 - fit$surv[idx],
    se_greenwood  = fit$std.err[idx],
    n_candidates  = nrow(dt_pos),
    surv_lower    = fit$lower[idx],
    surv_upper    = fit$upper[idx]
  )
}

single_dedup_draw_ped <- function(dt, p_max, n_min,
                                  t_horizon, seed) {
  set.seed(seed)
  setDT(dt)
  dt[, candidate_id := as.character(WL_ID_CODE)]
  dt_dedup <- dt[, .SD[sample.int(.N, 1L)],
                 by = .(candidate_id, sequence)]
  results <- data.table(
    position      = seq_len(p_max),
    mortality     = NA_real_,
    se_greenwood  = NA_real_,
    var_greenwood = NA_real_,
    ci_lower      = NA_real_,
    ci_upper      = NA_real_,
    n_candidates  = NA_integer_
  )
  for (p in seq_len(p_max)) {
    sub <- as.data.frame(dt_dedup[sequence == p])
    if (nrow(sub) < n_min) next
    res <- km_at_horizon(sub, t_horizon)
    if (is.null(res)) next
    results[p, `:=`(
      mortality     = res$mortality,
      se_greenwood  = res$se_greenwood,
      var_greenwood = res$se_greenwood^2,
      ci_lower      = 1 - res$surv_upper,
      ci_upper      = 1 - res$surv_lower,
      n_candidates  = res$n_candidates
    )]
  }
  return(results)
}

prep_dedup_input_all <- function(system_name) {
  outcome_long_all %>%
    filter(System == system_name) %>%
    as.data.table()
}

cat("Functions defined.\n")

# ── Step 15: Run KM by position ───────────────────────────────────
cat("Running Current System...\n")
result_current_all <- single_dedup_draw_ped(
  prep_dedup_input_all("Current System"),
  CONFIG_PED$P_MAX, CONFIG_PED$N_MIN,
  CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON, CONFIG_PED$SEED
)
cat("Non-NA positions:",
    sum(!is.na(result_current_all$mortality)), "\n")

cat("Running 4-Status Counterfactual...\n")
result_cf_all <- single_dedup_draw_ped(
  prep_dedup_input_all("4-Status Counterfactual"),
  CONFIG_PED$P_MAX, CONFIG_PED$N_MIN,
  CONFIG_PED$T_HORIZON, CONFIG_PED$SEED
)
cat("Non-NA positions:",
    sum(!is.na(result_cf_all$mortality)), "\n")

# ── Step 16: Build obs_km_seq_all ─────────────────────────────────
obs_km_seq_all <- bind_rows(
  result_current_all[!is.na(mortality)] %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    transmute(
      System      = "Current System",
      sequence    = position,
      km_90       = mortality,
      km_90_lower = ci_lower,
      km_90_upper = ci_upper
    ),
  result_cf_all[!is.na(mortality)] %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    transmute(
      System      = "4-Status Counterfactual",
      sequence    = position,
      km_90       = mortality,
      km_90_lower = ci_lower,
      km_90_upper = ci_upper
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    System = factor(System,
                    levels = c("Current System",
                               "4-Status Counterfactual"))
  )

cat("\nKey numbers:\n")
obs_km_seq_all %>%
  filter(sequence %in% c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20, 50)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(km_90, km_90_lower, km_90_upper),
                ~ round(. * 100, 1))) %>%
  print()

# ── Median acceptance position ────────────────────────────────────
median_accept_all <- ptr_all_ped %>%
  filter(OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y") %>%
  summarise(med = median(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM,
                         na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(med)

ptr_all_ped %>%
  filter(OFFER_ACCEPT == "Y") %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25    = quantile(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM, 0.25,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
    q75    = quantile(PTR_SEQUENCE_NUM, 0.75,
                      na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print()

# ── Step 17: Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggplot(obs_km_seq_all,
       aes(x = sequence, y = km_90,
           color = System, fill = System)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = km_90_lower,
                  ymax = km_90_upper),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = median_accept_all,
    linetype   = "dashed",
    color      = "black",
    linewidth  = 0.8
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x     = median_accept_all + 0.5,
    y     = 0.17,
    label = paste0("Median Sequence at\nAcceptance (Position ",
                   round(median_accept_all), ")"),
    hjust = 0, size = 4, color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Current System"          = "#374e55",
    "4-Status Counterfactual" = "#b24745"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Current System"          = "#374e55",
    "4-Status Counterfactual" = "#b24745"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1),
    limits = c(0.03, 0.17)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 20)) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 1),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x     = "Match Run Sequence Position",
    y     = "3-Month Rate of Death or Deterioration",
    color = "Allocation System",
    fill  = "Allocation System"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title         = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.title       = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 15),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.box         = "vertical",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )




ggplot(obs_km_seq_all,
       aes(x = sequence, y = km_90,
           color = System, fill = System)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = km_90_lower,
                  ymax = km_90_upper),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(
    aes(xintercept = median_accept_all,
        linetype   = "Median Acceptance Position"),
    color     = "black",
    linewidth  = 0.8
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x     = 1,
    y     = 0.035,
    label = "*",
    size  = 7,
    color = "black",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Current System"          = "#374e55",
    "4-Status Counterfactual" = "#b24745"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Current System"          = "#374e55",
    "4-Status Counterfactual" = "#b24745"
  )) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Median Sequence at Offer Acceptance" = "dashed"),
    name   = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1),
    limits = c(0.03, 0.165)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 20, 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1, 20)) +
  guides(
    color    = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 1),
    fill     = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 1),
    linetype = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 2)
  ) +
  labs(
    x     = "Match Run Sequence Position",
    y     = "3-Month Rate of Death or Deterioration",
    color = "Allocation System",
    fill  = "Allocation System"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title         = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.title       = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 15),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.box         = "vertical",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )




library(clinfun)

# ── Gradient trend test: positions 1-20 ──────────────────────────


# ── Approach 2: JT test on individual candidate outcomes ──────────
cat("\n=== Jonckheere-Terpstra trend test ===\n")
cat("(Alternative: decreasing — higher position = lower mortality)\n")

for (sys in c("Current System", "4-Status Counterfactual")) {
  sub <- outcome_long_all %>%
    filter(System == sys, sequence <= 20)
  
  cat("\n", sys, ":\n")
  cat("  N observations:", nrow(sub), "\n")
  cat("  N events:", sum(sub$event), "\n")
  
  jt <- tryCatch({
    jonckheere.test(
      x           = sub$event,
      g           = factor(sub$sequence,
                           ordered = TRUE),
      alternative = "decreasing",
      nperm       = 2000
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  Error:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    NULL
  })
  
  if (!is.null(jt)) {
    cat("  JT statistic:", round(jt$statistic, 1), "\n")
    cat("  JT p-value:", round(jt$p.value, 4), "\n")
  }
}

# ── Summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nMortality at key positions:\n")
obs_km_seq_all %>%
  filter(sequence %in% c(1, 2, 3, 5, 10, 20)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(km_90, km_90_lower, km_90_upper),
                ~ round(. * 100, 1))) %>%
  select(System, sequence, km_90,
         km_90_lower, km_90_upper) %>%
  arrange(System, sequence) %>%
  print()








# ── Pointwise comparison of KM curves ────────────────────────────
# Join current and CF estimates at each position
curve_diff <- obs_km_seq_all %>%
  filter(sequence <= 20) %>%
  select(System, sequence, km_90,
         km_90_lower, km_90_upper) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = System,
    values_from = c(km_90, km_90_lower, km_90_upper)
  ) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    diff = km_90_4_status_counterfactual -
      km_90_current_system,
    # SE of difference assuming independence
    se_current = (km_90_upper_current_system -
                    km_90_lower_current_system) / (2 * 1.96),
    se_cf      = (km_90_upper_4_status_counterfactual -
                    km_90_lower_4_status_counterfactual) / (2 * 1.96),
    se_diff    = sqrt(se_current^2 + se_cf^2),
    z          = diff / se_diff,
    p_value    = 2 * pnorm(-abs(z)),
    p_fmt      = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
      p_value < 0.01  ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value),
      TRUE            ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value)
    ),
    diff_pct   = round(diff * 100, 1),
    lower_diff = round((diff - 1.96 * se_diff) * 100, 2),
    upper_diff = round((diff + 1.96 * se_diff) * 100, 2)
  )

cat("Pointwise difference (CF - Current) at each position:\n")
curve_diff %>%
  select(sequence, diff_pct, lower_diff,
         upper_diff, p_fmt) %>%
  print(n = 20)


```
